title: Session 9: Product Rule
content:
« Previous | Next »
Overview In this session we apply the main formula to a product of two functions. The result is a rule for writing the derivative of a product in terms of the factors and their derivatives.
Lecture Video and Notes Video Excerpts Clip 1: Introduction of Product and Quotient Rules
Clip 2: Introduction to General Rules for Differentiation
Clip 3: Product Rule
